nasb.text: For there is no distinction between Jew and Greek; for the same Lord is Lord of all, abounding in riches for all who call on Him;

esv.text: For there is no distinction between Jew and Greek; for the same Lord is Lord of all, bestowing his riches on all who call on him.

cnv.text: 其實並不分猶太人和希臘人，因為大家同有一位主；他厚待所有求告他的人，

ccb.text: 犹太人和希腊人并没有分别，因为主是所有人的主，祂厚待所有求告祂的人，

csbs.text: 犹太人和外邦人并没有分别，原来，万人共同的主，使所有求告他的人都富足。
